answers: Learn animation: understand 12 principles of animation (squash/stretch, anticipation, timing, etc.). Start with simple bouncing ball.
2D animation tools: Krita (free), OpenToonz (free), Adobe Animate, Procreate (iPad). Start with frame-by-frame basics.
Animation basics: keyframes define major poses, in-betweens create smooth motion. Start with 12fps for learning.
Animation shekha: bouncing ball diye shuru koro, 12 principles shikho, free software use koro, ar patient thako — it takes time.
